hero.headline: Every bouquet, a story of yours
hero.body: Crafted with passion since 2023, Me Hoa delivers elegant floral arrangements with fair pricing, touching narratives, and a dedicated, sweet customer service.

about.title: About Us
about.headline: From Passion to Floristry, Delivering Love
about.p1: Established in 2023 in Hanoi, Me Hoa is not just selling flowers; it is a space where your emotions and stories are beautifully woven into every fresh leaf and glowing bloom.
about.p2: We understand that special occasions like Valentine's Day, March 8th, October 20th, or even a random sweet morning carry a unique sentiment. That is why every single product at Me Hoa is meticulously crafted, from select fresh flowers to bespoke greeting card writing and reliable service.
about.diff1_desc: Super affordable budgets ranging from 200k – 500k VND, yet assuring high-quality blossoms and graceful creations.
about.diff2_desc: More than just wrapping bouquets, we help convey your direct messages through thoughtful storytelling and personalized advice.
about.diff3_desc: Tailor-made designs, high-resolution final product photo previews before dispatch, and speedy delivery across Hanoi.

services.title: Services
services.headline: What Me Hoa Does Best
services.desc: A curated variety of products styled with romantic vintage and sophisticated minimalist aesthetics, perfect for any special celebrations or random surprises.
services.bouquet_desc: Charming rounded or long bouquets with gentle color grading, ideal for birthdays, anniversaries, and bright graduations.
services.basket_desc: Elegant and classic arrangements, perfectly suitable for work desks, living rooms, or professional partner presents.
services.stand_desc: Tall, grand floral displays symbolizing prosperity, growth, and good luck for grand openings and large events.
services.wedding_desc: Handpicked delicate compositions, walking besides brides on the most romantic walk of their lives.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.headline: Our Floral Creations
gallery.sub: A showcase of actual floral styling selected from thousands of sweet orders we create daily for our valued customers.

process.title: Process
process.headline: Ordering Flowers Has Never Been Easier
process.badge: Pre-order 1–2 days in advance for best care | Urgent orders supported: 1–2 hours minimum
process.step1_desc: Chat with us via Zalo, Facebook, or Gmail. We discuss your ideal style, occasion, budget, and recommend matching florals.
process.step2_desc: Confirm your final design, custom greeting card content, delivery schedule, and address details without any hidden surcharges.
process.step3_desc: Once assembled, Me Hoa sends you real-time photo checks of the final arrangement. We only dispatch when you are 100% happy.
process.step4_desc: Express shipping up to a 15km radius in Hanoi by professional flower carriers to keep the product absolutely flawless.
process.step5_desc: Receive helpful care tips to keep your blooms fresh and vibrant for days, coupled with our caring after-sales client assistance.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What is the average price range of products at Me Hoa?
faq.a1: Me Hoa offers a wide price selection starting from 200,000 VND, most commonly within the 200k - 500k range. Highly accessible for students and office workers while maintaining excellent volume and design.
faq.q2: Do you offer home delivery? Which areas?
faq.a2: Yes! We deliver across Hanoi inner city districts within a 15km radius. Delivery fees are calculated directly based on the active ride-hailing app rates at delivery time.
faq.q3: How far in advance should I order?
faq.a3: Ideally, 1 - 2 days beforehand so we can source the freshest flowers. For urgent needs, we support express orders in 1 - 2 hours minimum.
faq.q4: Can I custom order colors or specific floral details?
faq.a4: Absolutely! Feel free to share your preferred color tones. If a specific flower is out of season, we will advise on similar substitute flowers of the same value to preserve the look.
faq.a5: We accept bank bank transfers (highly recommended when sending flowers as a surprise gift) or cash on delivery (COD).

contact.title: Order Flowers
contact.subtitle: Get in touch for quick, warm, and highly personalized advice from our team
contact.location_badge: Service Area: Inner Hanoi districts (15km radius)
contact.noted: SPECIAL OFFER: Complimentary custom designed, hand-written greeting cards for all flower orders.
